artifacts.purpose: Configurable project scaffold, baseline scenes and prefabs, and validation tools.
non_claims: No runtime device behavior is claimed

artifacts.purpose: Vendor-neutral XR greybox initialization, rig helpers, configuration, and interaction validation.
non_claims: No headset behavior is claimed without device evidence

artifacts.purpose: Engine-light Inventory domain model, transactions, policies, events, snapshots, and persistence contracts.
non_claims: No Unity authoring, UI, equipment, persistence provider, networking, or XR adapter is included
Candidate compatibility applies to the 0.1.x Core release line; no stable or 1.0 claim is made
Clean-consumer Core evidence does not prove the complete Inventory product family

artifacts.purpose: Positive-source-only architecture, package boundaries, capability coverage, and verification gates for a reusable Inventory package family.
non_claims: Core and Unity authoring are candidate; UGUI and XR remain pending
No community Inventory repository is an admitted code seed
No XR runtime behavior is claimed

artifacts.purpose: ScriptableObject item, catalog, container, and inventory authoring with deterministic Core conversion and actionable validation.
non_claims: No player state is stored in authoring assets
No UGUI, XR, scene, storage provider, or product content is included
Candidate authoring evidence does not prove later presentation or XR layers

artifacts.purpose: Presenter-owned Inventory UGUI with independently replaceable nested prefab roles and replayable states.
non_claims: No XR Interaction Toolkit dependency or world-space comfort claim
No product styling, scene, localization catalog, or item database
Local presentation evidence does not prove immutable non-XR consumption or headset usability
